channel.title: Nanjing on EICP-LAB
channel.description: Recent content in Nanjing on EICP-LAB

item.title: The 5th CAERE
item.description: PhD Candidate Zhenhuan Yang was invited to present his research titled “Broader But Thinner: How Extreme Rainfall Redistributes Government Support to Local Suppliers”, conducted in collaboration with Professor Yangsiyu Lu, at the 5th CAERE Annual Conference organized by Nanjing University of Finance and Economics.
